name: Blender / Juicer – Explosive Wedge Promo Flyer
svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" viewBox="0 0 1080 1350" width="1080" height="1350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bl-wedge1" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1" gradientUnits="objectBoundingBox">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_WEDGE1_START"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_WEDGE1_END"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="bl-wedge2" x1="1" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1" gradientUnits="objectBoundingBox">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_WEDGE2_START"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_WEDGE2_END"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="bl-wedge3" x1="0" y1="1" x2="1" y2="0" gradientUnits="objectBoundingBox">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_WEDGE3_START"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_WEDGE3_END"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="bl-wedge4" x1="1" y1="1" x2="0" y2="0" gradientUnits="objectBoundingBox">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_WEDGE4_START"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_WEDGE4_END"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="bl-center" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1" gradientUnits="objectBoundingBox">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_CIRCLE_TOP"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_CIRCLE_BOTTOM"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="bl-bottom" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1" gradientUnits="objectBoundingBox">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BAND_TOP"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BAND_BOTTOM"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <clipPath id="bl-img-clip">
      <circle cx="540" cy="580" r="310"/>
    </clipPath>
    <clipPath id="bl-canvas">
      <rect width="1080" height="1350"/>
    </clipPath>
  </defs>

  <g clip-path="url(#bl-canvas)">

  <!-- LAYER 1: 4 explosive color wedges radiating from centre (540,580) -->
  <polygon points="540,580 0,0 720,0 0,440"        fill="url(#bl-wedge1)"/>
  <polygon points="540,580 720,0 1080,0 1080,520"  fill="url(#bl-wedge2)"/>
  <polygon points="540,580 0,440 0,1080 400,1080"  fill="url(#bl-wedge3)"/>
  <polygon points="540,580 1080,520 1080,1080 400,1080" fill="url(#bl-wedge4)"/>

  <!-- LAYER 2: bottom dark band -->
  <rect x="0" y="1080" width="1080" height="270" fill="url(#bl-bottom)"/>
  <line x1="0" y1="1080" x2="1080" y2="1080" stroke="#FFFFFF" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.08"/>

  <!-- LAYER 3: spec stamps inside wedges -->
  <!-- wedge 1 top-left -->
  <text x="80"  y="160" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="100" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.18" letter-spacing="-3">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC1_VALUE</text>
  <text x="80"  y="248" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif"    font-size="12"  fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.7"  letter-spacing="4">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC1_LABEL</text>
  <!-- wedge 2 top-right -->
  <text x="680" y="160" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="100" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.18" letter-spacing="-3">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC2_VALUE</text>
  <text x="680" y="248" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif"    font-size="12"  fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.7"  letter-spacing="4">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC2_LABEL</text>
  <!-- wedge 3 bottom-left -->
  <text x="40"  y="900" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="100" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.18" letter-spacing="-3">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC3_VALUE</text>
  <text x="40"  y="988" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif"    font-size="12"  fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.7"  letter-spacing="4">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC3_LABEL</text>
  <!-- wedge 4 bottom-right -->
  <text x="660" y="900" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="100" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.18" letter-spacing="-3">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC4_VALUE</text>
  <text x="660" y="988" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif"    font-size="12"  fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.7"  letter-spacing="4">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC4_LABEL</text>

  <!-- LAYER 4: outer glow ring behind circle -->
  <circle cx="540" cy="580" r="340" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BAND_TOP" fill-opacity="0.3"/>

  <!-- LAYER 5: dark product circle -->
  <circle cx="540" cy="580" r="310" fill="url(#bl-center)"/>

  <!-- LAYER 6: product image clipped to circle -->
  <g clip-path="url(#bl-img-clip)">
    <image href="PLACEHOLDER_PRODUCT_IMAGE" x="230" y="270" width="620" height="620" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet"/>
  </g>

  <!-- LAYER 7: circle border -->
  <circle cx="540" cy="580" r="310" fill="none" stroke="#FFFFFF" stroke-width="2" stroke-opacity="0.12"/>

  <!-- LAYER 8: store name — vertical left spine -->
  <line x1="58" y1="60" x2="58" y2="1060" stroke="#FFFFFF" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.15"/>
  <text x="38" y="680" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="600" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.9" letter-spacing="8" text-anchor="middle" transform="rotate(-90 38 680)">PLACEHOLDER_STORE_NAME</text>

  <!-- LAYER 9: price tag — rotated stamp in top-right wedge -->
  <g transform="rotate(-8 860 120)">
    <rect x="750" y="52" width="296" height="130" rx="4" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.92"/>
    <text x="898" y="104" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif"    font-size="12" font-weight="600" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_WEDGE2_END" letter-spacing="3">PLACEHOLDER_PRICE_LABEL</text>
    <text x="898" y="158" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="56" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BAND_TOP" letter-spacing="-2">PLACEHOLDER_PRICE_VALUE</text>
  </g>

  <!-- LAYER 10: product name in bottom band -->
  <text x="72" y="1168" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="88" fill="#FFFFFF"                        letter-spacing="-2">PLACEHOLDER_TITLE_LINE1</text>
  <text x="72" y="1256" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="88" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_WEDGE1_START" letter-spacing="-2">PLACEHOLDER_TITLE_LINE2</text>

  <!-- LAYER 11: tagline right side of band -->
  <text x="1042" y="1148" text-anchor="end" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="16" font-weight="300" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.4" letter-spacing="1">PLACEHOLDER_TAGLINE_LINE1</text>
  <text x="1042" y="1176" text-anchor="end" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="16" font-weight="300" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.4" letter-spacing="1">PLACEHOLDER_TAGLINE_LINE2</text>

  <!-- LAYER 12: bottom divider -->
  <line x1="72" y1="1272" x2="1042" y2="1272" stroke="#FFFFFF" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.1"/>

  <!-- LAYER 13: CTA strip + social handle -->
  <rect x="72" y="1290" width="560" height="48" rx="0" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.06" stroke="#FFFFFF" stroke-width="0.5" stroke-opacity="0.12"/>
  <text x="352" y="1322" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="15" font-weight="500" fill="#FFFFFF" letter-spacing="4">PLACEHOLDER_CTA_TEXT</text>
  <text x="1042" y="1322" text-anchor="end"   font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="15" font-weight="400" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.3" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_SOCIAL_HANDLE</text>

  </g>
</svg>
